content.en:
"The Holy Ancestor knows the more terrifying Top Ancestor?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Yes!" the Realm Ancestor nodded, "This secret is not known to a few Ancestors, the Destruction Ancestor knows, the Dark Holy Gate knows to a few Ancestors, and I and the War Ancestor know. "

"Could it be the Sleeping Apex Ancestor?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Realm Ancestor said solemnly: "That's right, it is the sleeping top ancestor, according to our guess, the original Saint Ancestor was able to become the first ancestor of the Dark Sacred Domain, and he became the ancestor since the founding ancestor method, he should have been guided by the top ancestor." Otherwise, in just a few dozen realm years, how could he create the Ancestor Law by himself?"

Ye Tian nodded, even if he was as evil as him, and there was the Ultimate Ancestral Fu, it would take a long time to create an Ancestor Law by himself.

And the original Holy Ancestor was definitely not as demonic as him, but he could create his own Ancestor Law in dozens of realm years, which was definitely not normal.

After all, the cultivation system of the Dark Sacred Domain had only been created for a short time, and it was impossible for the Dark Destruction Domain to guide the cultivation system of the Dark Sacred Domain, so it was even more difficult to become an Ancestor at that time.

However, in that case, the Holy Ancestors can all create the Ancestor Dharma and become the Ancestor, which is naturally not normal.

"Realm Ancestor, is there any evidence, it's just speculation, I'm afraid it's not enough!" Ye Tiandao.

"Naturally, it's not just a guess!" said the Realm Ancestor again: " Once, the Dark Destruction Domain invaded the Dark Sacred Domain again, at that time I had just been promoted to the Ancestor, the Holy Ancestor had just lost the power increase of the Dark Sacred Domain, at that time, the Dark Sacred Domain was at its weakest, the Holy Ancestor was not the opponent of the Destruction Ancestor, and the Destruction Ancestor took out a terrible treasure, which was able to kill an elite ancestor, at that time the Holy Ancestor was still in the Elite Ancestor, and the other Ancestors were still fighting so they didn't pay attention to the battle of the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor, but I am different, I have a special means, I can perceive the battle of the entire Dark Sacred Domain and any slight fluctuations。 At that time, the blow of the Ancestor of Destruction to sacrifice the treasure was blocked by a finger. "

"I wasn't mistaken, it was indeed a finger, although it was fleeting, but it was indeed a finger, and then it was gone. After that, the Ancestor of Destruction retreated, not daring to invade the Dark Sanctuary again. From that point on, the battle between the Dark Destruction Domain and the Dark Sanctuary will not involve the Ancestors, it will be a petty fight!"

"Before, I was too weak to perceive the strength of the owner of that finger, but now I know that it is definitely a top ancestor, and a top ancestor who is many times stronger than the top ancestor of the Destruction Ancestor, the Holy Ancestor and others. The other party made a move for the Holy Ancestor, and I am afraid that he has a close relationship with the Holy Ancestor, so I guess that he has guided the Holy Ancestor, and may even be the master of the Holy Ancestor, who is the oldest top ancestor in the Dark Forbidden Domain. "

After the Realm Ancestor finished speaking, Ye Tian paid a little attention to it.

Although his current strength has also reached the top top of the top Ancestor combat power, he is not far from the top Ancestor extreme.

But he knew very well that he should not be invincible at the level of the top ancestor.

Some of the oldest top ancestors, I'm afraid that their combat power has reached a level where they can't be advanced.

Naturally, he would not deliberately be an enemy of such a top ancestor.

But the point is, those top ancestors may be his enemies.

After all, the human race gave birth to ancestors one after another, and cultivated an ancestral realm, and his strength was comparable to the top elite ancestors as soon as he broke through, which was contrary to the cognition of the ancestors.

All the Ancestors knew that he had a big secret, but they just weren't sure how to deal with him.

But if one day, those top ancestors united, he was really in some danger.

If it weren't for this reminder from the Realm Ancestor, he would really think that he was very safe and almost invincible.

"Although I feel that I have reached the peak of the top ancestor, in fact, my strength can be improved a lot, but if I cultivate slowly, the speed of strength improvement will not be too fast, and now my strength is already very slow, unless I get a big opportunity!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Big chances are rare, and there are few opportunities in the Dark Forbidden Realm at the moment, except for those forbidden places.

"The six forbidden lands are too dangerous for me, but although some of the other forbidden lands have the fall of the ancestors, there are also records of the ancestors escaping and surviving. Those ancestors may not have obtained good things, but it is okay if my copy body falls, as long as I don't encounter a means that can erase my body by copying my body, it doesn't matter. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In short, there is a slight risk, but not a big risk.

Besides, it was impossible for him to stay here like this forever and cultivate penance, in that case, he would almost never be able to break the shackles of the top ancestor and impact to the level of the strongest ancestor.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to communicate with one ancestor after another to learn some information about the forbidden land.

Those ancestors may not tell all the information, but at least they will reveal a little bit, plus the information of the War Ancestor and the Realm Ancestor, Ye Tian knows more about these forbidden places.

Under the six forbidden lands, there are dozens of forbidden lands that are dangerous to the ancestors, but there are only eight forbidden lands that are very dangerous to the top ancestors, and some other forbidden lands are not dangerous to the top ancestors, but only to ordinary ancestors and elite ancestors.

Therefore, even if there are good things in the general forbidden land, they have long been taken away.

Therefore, Ye Tian's target was those eight top-level forbidden lands.

After some screening, Ye Tian chose one of the forbidden places, the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

This forbidden place has many inexplicable bones, hence its name.

The Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones is very dangerous, even the top ancestors don't dare to go deeper, they only dare to stay outside for a few breaths, so that they won't fall, once they go a little deeper or stay a little longer, I'm afraid it will be dangerous.

In the sea of bones, there is a special creature - the bone soldier.

This kind of bone soldier is a bit like the bone clan of the three thousand evil clans of the Dark Destruction Domain, but the difference in strength between the two sides is worlds apart.

Ordinary bone soldiers have the combat power of ordinary ancestors, and there are many such bone soldiers, at least thousands, as well as bone generals and bone kings.

Among them, the Bone General has the combat power of the Elite Ancestor, and the Bone King has the combat power of the Elite Ancestor.

With so many ancestors, once surrounded, even the top ancestors had no chance to escape.

What is the fate of the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones, there is only one thing I know at present, that is, the bone beads.

Once, the Ancestor of Destruction infiltrated the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones, killed a bone soldier, and obtained a bone bead, and the bone bead can improve cultivation, this is the news revealed by the Ancestor of Destruction, but no one dares to go in and hunt the bone soldier.

Because, even the Ancestor of Destruction was seriously injured and returned, and he almost didn't come back.

"Bone beads can improve cultivation, suitable for me, if my copy body can kill some more bone soldiers and bring back some bone beads, then I can improve my strength in a short time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
